title: biomi flat taxon record
description: One record per taxon in data/taxa.json. The flat, ID-keyed source of truth; build.py derives the nested visualization tree from it.

id.description: Stable local key (currently the scientific name; unique across the dataset).

parent.description: id of the parent taxon; null for the single root.

speciesCount.description: Accepted-species richness used for visual scaling.

gbifSpeciesCount.description: GBIF backbone species count (includes synonyms/unplaced; documented, not the display count).

dist.description: Native species richness per WGSRPD level-1 botanical continent, keyed by code (1 Europe … 9 Antarctic). From WCVP; set by build/wcvp.py. The viz aggregates it up to internal nodes.
